deep_reasoning.description: Use for planning, architecture and complex reasoning with broader context handling.

code_execution.description: Use for implementation tasks that need reliable code changes and focused execution.

reviewer.description: Use for code review, certification and evidence-driven quality checks.

creative_product.description: Use for branding, UX direction and product framing where taste matters.

security.description: Use for security-sensitive tasks, secrets, access boundaries and destructive risk assessment.

cost_saver.description: Use for lightweight documentation, triage and low-risk tasks where cost discipline matters.
